//: gateway — NestJS HTTP server, the only public-facing entry point.
Exposes a REST API on port 3000, proxies requests to the expenses-service
microservice over TCP, and hosts the Swagger UI for API documentation.
Handles rate-limiting, request validation, and JWT authentication.
name: @app/gateway
// private: Not published to npm; consumed only within this monorepo workspace.
// scripts: Lifecycle scripts for development, production, and linting.

scripts.// build: Compile TypeScript to JavaScript using this app's tsconfig.json. Output lands in dist/.
// dev: Start the gateway in watch mode using ts-node-dev.
--respawn         restart the process when a crash occurs
--transpile-only  skip type-checking for speed (tsc handles type errors separately)
-r tsconfig-paths/register  register path aliases (@shared/*, @app/*) at runtime
// start: Run the pre-compiled app in production.
-r tsconfig-paths/register is still needed because the compiled JS files
still contain the alias strings that Node.js cannot resolve on its own.
scripts.// lint: Lint only the src directory of this service.
